title: PostCSS
body:
## Definition

**PostCSS** transforms CSS with JavaScript plugins — Autoprefixer, nesting, custom syntax — in the build pipeline.

## Why it exists

Future CSS features and vendor prefixes via [Browserslist](concept:browserslist) without manual `-webkit-` maintenance.

## How it works

CSS → PostCSS plugin chain → output CSS. Often integrated in Vite/Webpack alongside Tailwind (which uses PostCSS).

## Common confusion

Not a preprocessor like Sass — plugin ecosystem defines behavior. Tailwind is a PostCSS plugin.

## In practice

Autoprefixer + cssnano for production minification; `@tailwind` directives in global CSS.
bodyLinked:
## Definition

**[PostCSS](concept:postcss)** transforms CSS with JavaScript plugins — [Autoprefixer](concept:postcss), nesting, custom syntax — in the build pipeline.

## Why it exists

Future CSS features and vendor prefixes via [Browserslist](concept:browserslist) without manual `-webkit-` maintenance.

## How it works

CSS → [PostCSS](concept:postcss) plugin chain → output CSS. Often integrated in [Vite](concept:vite)/Webpack alongside [Tailwind](concept:css-in-react) (which uses [PostCSS](concept:postcss)).

## Common confusion

Not a preprocessor like Sass — plugin ecosystem defines behavior. [Tailwind](concept:css-in-react) is a [PostCSS](concept:postcss) plugin.

## In practice

[Autoprefixer](concept:postcss) + cssnano for production minification; `@tailwind` directives in global CSS.
